originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&m_has_modinfo` is never used.

reasoning: Line 18: `m_has_modinfo = 1` (or L16: = 0). m_has_modinfo is assigned in the if/else at L15-18 but never read afterward — dead store. These assignments are outside any #ifdef. No '// ERROR' for m_has_modinfo → new bug not in VBDB. When VERSION_CHECKING=F, k_crcs at L25 is undeclared (outside #ifdef) → compile error, making VERSION_CHECKING=F non-compilable. The dead store exists only in compilable configs (VERSION_CHECKING=T). PC = VERSION_CHECKING=T is exactly correct. Classification: TRUE_NEW.
